FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct TextStyle

Namespace
FluentGpu.Text
Assembly
FluentGpu.Text.dll

The resolved style a text run is measured/shaped under. Weight is the NUMERIC font weight (WinUI FontWeight — the int IS the DWRITE_FONT_WEIGHT, 1..999; callers resolve sugar like Bold→700 before constructing; 0 is treated as 400). CharSpacing is WinUI TextElement.CharacterSpacing — tracking in 1/1000 em, applied per glyph after shaping. LineHeight (DIP; NaN/≤0 = font-natural) resolves per Stacking (WinUI LineStackingStrategy), and LineBounds (WinUI TextLineBounds) selects the reported line box (Full = ascent..descent, Tight = cap-height..baseline). Record equality over ALL fields is load-bearing: TextStyle is the TextMeasureCache key, so every layout-affecting input must live here.

<p><xref href="FluentGpu.Text.TextStyle.SpanRunId" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref> (0 = plain single-style run) keys a <xref href="FluentGpu.Foundation.SpanRunTable.Shared" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref> run whose
per-range <xref href="FluentGpu.Foundation.SpanStyle" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref> overlays (weight/size/family/color/decorations) apply over this base style — the
rtb-01 inline-run model: the WHOLE text still shapes as ONE flow (one wrap pass), exactly like a WinUI paragraph's
inline collection. Carried here (not as a separate seam argument) so every existing layout/measure/query path —
and every cache keyed on TextStyle — is span-aware without signature churn; a span-content change mints a fresh
id, so the measure cache and the shaped-run cache self-invalidate.</p>

public readonly record struct TextStyle : IEquatable<TextStyle>
Implements
IEquatable<TextStyle>
Inherited Members
ValueType.Equals(object)
ValueType.GetHashCode()
ValueType.ToString()
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)

Constructors

TextStyle(StringId, float, ushort, TextWrap, TextTrim, int, float, float, LineStacking, TextLineBounds, int)

The resolved style a text run is measured/shaped under. Weight is the NUMERIC font weight (WinUI FontWeight — the int IS the DWRITE_FONT_WEIGHT, 1..999; callers resolve sugar like Bold→700 before constructing; 0 is treated as 400). CharSpacing is WinUI TextElement.CharacterSpacing — tracking in 1/1000 em, applied per glyph after shaping. LineHeight (DIP; NaN/≤0 = font-natural) resolves per Stacking (WinUI LineStackingStrategy), and LineBounds (WinUI TextLineBounds) selects the reported line box (Full = ascent..descent, Tight = cap-height..baseline). Record equality over ALL fields is load-bearing: TextStyle is the TextMeasureCache key, so every layout-affecting input must live here.

<p><xref href="FluentGpu.Text.TextStyle.SpanRunId" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref> (0 = plain single-style run) keys a <xref href="FluentGpu.Foundation.SpanRunTable.Shared" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref> run whose
per-range <xref href="FluentGpu.Foundation.SpanStyle" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref> overlays (weight/size/family/color/decorations) apply over this base style — the
rtb-01 inline-run model: the WHOLE text still shapes as ONE flow (one wrap pass), exactly like a WinUI paragraph's
inline collection. Carried here (not as a separate seam argument) so every existing layout/measure/query path —
and every cache keyed on TextStyle — is span-aware without signature churn; a span-content change mints a fresh
id, so the measure cache and the shaped-run cache self-invalidate.</p>

public TextStyle(StringId FontFamily, float SizeDip, ushort Weight, TextWrap Wrap = TextWrap.NoWrap, TextTrim Trim = TextTrim.None, int MaxLines = 0, float CharSpacing = 0, float LineHeight = NaN, LineStacking Stacking = LineStacking.MaxHeight, TextLineBounds LineBounds = TextLineBounds.Full, int SpanRunId = 0)

Parameters

FontFamily StringId
SizeDip float
Weight ushort
Wrap TextWrap
Trim TextTrim
MaxLines int
CharSpacing float
LineHeight float
Stacking LineStacking
LineBounds TextLineBounds
SpanRunId int

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
